message:
feat(fwc): add zone-scoped tool filtering to MCP server

Extends the MCP tool definition and server state to support zone-aware
tool exposure. Connectors can now declare which zones their tools belong
to, and the MCP server filters the tool listing based on the active zone
context.

- McpToolDefinition: added supported_zones field with builder pattern
  (with_supported_zones), query methods (supported_zones, supports_zone)
- state_from_connectors: propagates connector.supported_zones into tool
  definitions during state construction
- tool_matches_server_filters: new predicate combining connector filter
  and zone filter for tool visibility
- Imported zone_scope types (CapabilityToken, ZoneId, ZoneRegistry,
  ZoneScopedTool, ZoneViolation, validate_tool_call) for integration
  with the zone enforcement layer
- registry_from_tools: resource registry construction unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
